claims.text: Holistic Trajectory Calibration (HTC) introduced in 2025 extracts "rich process-level features ranging from macro dynamics to micro stability across an agent's entire trajectory" and "consistently surpasses strong baselines in both calibration and discrimination, across eight benchmarks, multiple LLMs, and diverse agent frameworks"
claims.label: E

claims.text: SAUP formalizes uncertainty propagation within agent chains using "situational awareness by assigning situational weights to each step's uncertainty during the propagation" and employs Hidden Markov Models to estimate situational weights
claims.label: E

claims.text: EU AI Act requires accuracy not calibration, $47M penalties documented
claims.label: E

claims.text: Enterprise agentic RAG adoption delayed until 2026-2027
claims.label: E

claims.text: Early low-confidence decisions in agentic systems "poison" entire execution paths, leading agents to hold high confidence in completely incorrect results
claims.label: E

claims.text: Multi-agent systems show minimal accuracy gains compared to single agents
claims.label: E

claims.text: conformal prediction guarantees "do NOT compose for multi-agent" systems
claims.label: I
